title: poa glauca var. montana
intro: Poa glauca var. montana, also known as blue fescue grass, is a perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Poa glauca var. montana include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, often used to treat a variety of ailments, but it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
